heading: Severability
label: 3316 Severability
text: If any provision of this chapter or the application thereof to any person or circumstance is held invalid, the remainder of the chapter and the application of such provision to any other person or circumstance shall not be affected thereby.
notes: Effective DateSection effective as of , see , set out as a note under .January 1, 1979section 18 of Pub. L. 96–8section 3301 of this title
